title: Omnitrix Totem
description: An Omnitrix-inspired Totem of Undying texture with a clean, futuristic, and powerful look.
body:
![Omnitrix Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38354679a1a7469af0c6474e1886167a4e77d168_0.webp)

The Omnitrix Totem texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a design inspired by the Omnitrix. Featuring a clean, futuristic look with glowing details, this texture gives the totem a powerful and unique appearance while remaining instantly recognizable in gameplay.

Designed to fit both PvP and survival worlds, the Omnitrix Totem adds a stylish and heroic feel without affecting performance or visibility. The texture blends smoothly with vanilla visuals while standing out as a special item.

Features

Omnitrix-inspired Totem of Undying texture

Futuristic design with clean and glowing details

Clear and recognizable in PvP situations

Vanilla-friendly style with a unique theme

Works in survival, PvP, and multiplayer servers

Lightweight and performance-friendly
